unresolved_issues: Return-to-capital equation needs targeted source review before promotion because MinerU OCR is noisy around the capital-quality and depreciation terms.
Price-dispersion recursion is represented as an implementation cross-check; source paper directly reports the price-level law.
Steady-state calibration target solution for lambda, omega, and chi is not fully closed-form in the paper.
